title.en: When this wolf attacked, Ye Tian also killed th...

content.en:
It didn't take long for Ye Tian to encounter another wolf-like soul creature, whose soul strength was comparable to that of a god, much stronger than the previous black panther.

When this wolf attacked, Ye Tian also killed the other party in one move.

After all, Ye Tian's soul strength can far exceed the ordinary god level, after all, he is the son of the supreme level universe who stepped into the god level, and when he was at the emperor level, his soul strength was comparable to the god level, after becoming a god level, the soul strength naturally skyrocketed, which was not comparable to the ordinary god level.

However, after killing this wolf soul creature, Ye Tian was surprised to find that a green bead had fallen from this wolf soul creature.

He picked up the green bead and looked at it for a moment.

"It's so rich in soul breath, and it is extremely pure, not mixed with a trace of the soul breath of other creatures!"

Ye Tiandao.

At this time, he remembered the words of Kungo Supreme.

Kungo Supreme said that if you kill some soul creatures in the ghost world, you can strengthen the soul.

"This green bead should be able to increase the strength of the soul, absorb it and try it!"

Immediately, Ye Tian grabbed the bead and tried to absorb the refinement.

Wow!!!

A trace of soul energy poured into Ye Tian's immortal soul, growing Ye Tian's immortal soul little by little.

About an hour passed, and Ye Tian completely exhausted the soul energy of this green bead.

"The immortal soul is only a little stronger, obviously the quality of this green bead is average, and there is only one, the effect is not great!"

Ye Tian thought.

But if you get a large number of green beads, wouldn't you be able to increase the strength of the immortal soul again.

In the outside world, although the strength of the immortal soul can be increased, the cost is too great, and it seems that as long as you kill the soul creatures above the god level, you can get beads that increase the strength of the immortal soul.

In the following days, Ye Tian searched everywhere for soul creatures above the god level, killed them, and then absorbed the green beads to increase the soul strength.

One or two are not very useful, but the number is large, and the effect is really good.

Of course.

These green beads that can increase the strength of the soul are just a small harvest for Ye Tian, if there are only these gains, then it is not worth a trip in.

this day.

Ye Tian encountered a purple giant snake, and the soul aura of this giant snake far surpassed the other soul creatures that Ye Tian had encountered before.

If the soul aura of an ordinary god-level soul creature is regarded as 1, then the soul aura of this giant snake has definitely reached the level of 100, which is not much weaker than Ye Tian.

Such a soul creature was also encountered by Ye Tian for the first time.

Talent Identification
Species: Purple Soul Python
Soul Defense Talent: Pseudo-Arcane (30 Percent)
Soul Chain Talent: Top
Soul Spear Talent: Top
Soul Imprison Talent: Top

......

"Pseudo-Armaginish Soul Defense Talent !!"

Ye Tian was stunned.

He also has a soul defense talent, which is a top-level soul defense talent, but he feels that after the soul talent reaches the top, he can't continue to improve, but he feels that he can continue to improve.

But all along, he has not been able to comprehend the mystery of the soul, as if the mystery of the soul has been imprisoned by the universe, and it is even more difficult to comprehend than time and space.

Therefore, he never thought that the soul talent was above the top level.

But now, he knew he was wrong.

Soul talent does have a level above the top, after all, the soul is too mysterious, and it is impossible to only be promoted to the top.

It's just that the soul talent is too special, so it's difficult to continue to improve.

But now that Ye Tian has encountered a purple soul python with a pseudo-mystery-level soul defense talent, it is really Ye Tian's luck.

However, this is also what Ye Tian encountered, and others encountered it, and they couldn't see that this soul creature had a pseudo-mysterious-level soul defense talent, and there was no way to copy the other party's soul defense talent.

However, Ye Tian was able to copy the opponent's soul defense talent, allowing himself to also have a pseudo-mystery-level soul defense talent.

"Copy the pseudo-arcane level soul defense talent!"

One thought, copy successfully!

At this time, this Purple Soul Python also discovered Ye Tian and flew towards Ye Tian.

Then, one after another soul chains flew out of the Purple Mixed Sky Python's body, as if they were going to lock Ye Tian.

Ye Tian used the talent of the soul spear to create a soul spear, held the soul spear, and performed a spear technique, although it could not exert the power of the spear method, but it could make the effect of the soul spear greater.

Dangdang!!

One by one, the soul chains were knocked away by Ye Tian.

And Ye Tian also exerted his speed talent, but without the soul body of the physical body, even with the blessing of the speed talent, it is difficult to have a great effect.

But Ye Tian still had the initial upper hand and suppressed this Purple Soul Python.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian urged the space-time talent and used the power of time to keep this Purple Soul Python in a state of condensation.

Immediately, Ye Tian stabbed a spear into the eye of the Purple Soul Python, but this Purple Soul Python had a pseudo-mysterious-level soul defense talent, so this spear failed to penetrate the Purple Soul Python, but it still slightly injured the Purple Soul Python.

"Without a physical body, the combat effectiveness has been weakened countless times. Relying only on the soul body to fight is too disadvantageous in the ghost world!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Of course.

His strength has been weakened countless times, but the soul creatures here can only mobilize the power of the soul, and there is no other power.

Therefore, Ye Tian can also deal with the soul body creatures here, but he can't be so rebellious.

Boom Boom Boom !!!

Ye Tian kept fighting with this Purple Soul Python, although he could suppress this Purple Soul Python, it was difficult to kill him.

Because the defense of this Purple Soul Python is too high, it is a bit laborious to kill this Purple Soul Python.

"I wonder if I can mobilize the power of the Chaos Dao?"

Ye Tian came up with this idea.

Immediately, his mind moved, trying to mobilize the power of the Chaos Dao.

Bang!!!

The power of the Chaos Avenue descended, enveloping Ye Tian's soul spear and stabbing fiercely at the Purple Soul Python.

Poof!!

The Purple Soul Python was pierced by Ye Tian's spear and seriously injured it.

Puff puff puff!!

After a few spear attacks, the Purple Soul Python completely fell under Ye Tian's Soul Spear.

It turns out that the power of the Chaos Avenue can be exerted in the ghost realm, and yes, the power of the Great Dao is above everything, and it can be exerted even in the chaos. The power of the law can be weakened here, but it is difficult to weaken the power of the Chaos Dao!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Judging from the current situation, except for the soul power, soul talent, and the power of the Chaos Dao, the other means are basically severely restricted, and even the other laws are difficult to exert their due effects!

After killing the Purple Soul Python, a huge green bead was left behind where the Purple Soul Python dissipated.

Ye Tian looked at this green bead, its energy was at least dozens of times that of other beads, and its quality was far superior to that of other green beads.

"This bead should be able to increase some immortal strength!"

Immediately.

Ye Tian began to absorb and refine this big bead, and suddenly a large amount of soul energy poured into Ye Tian's immortal soul, constantly refining Ye Tian's immortal soul.

A few days later, Ye Tian absorbed all the energy of this big bead, and the strength of the immortal soul was unexpectedly increased by one percent.

"It's such a powerful effect, if I have a large number of these green beads, my immortal soul strength can definitely be quickly improved!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Due to the increase in the strength of the immortal soul, the combat power that Ye Tian can exert now has naturally increased.

"Fusion Pseudo-Arcane-level Soul Defense Talent!"

Ye Tian began to fuse.

Once he fused the pseudo-arcane level soul defense talent, Ye Tian's strength could increase a lot, and with his soul defense talent, it was enough to deal with the attacks of other soul creatures.

After all, in the ghost world, soul defense treasures cannot be carried, and they can only resist damage with their soul defense talent and their own soul strength.

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to hunt soul creatures, absorbing green beads, and making his soul strength stronger and stronger, and his strength naturally became stronger and stronger.

But this day.

Ye Tian found a stone building, a very large stone building.

This was also the first time Ye Tian had seen a building in the ghost world, and he was immediately very curious.

This is the appearance of a temple, and in front of the temple there are two humanoid warrior statues holding spears guarding the place.

Ye Tian was shocked to find that these stones were not simple, they were not ordinary stones, but stones composed of souls, which could be called soul stones.

In fact, everything in the ghost world is composed of soul power, and it is not uncommon to have stones composed of soul power.

"Isn't there a heritage in this temple?"

Ye Tian guessed.

As soon as he thought of the inheritance, Ye Tian was a little interested and ready to enter it.

But suddenly, the two stone statues at the entrance of the temple suddenly changed into two humanoid warriors.

"Hades Temple, outsiders are not allowed to enter!"

One of the warriors said coldly.

"The Temple of Hades?"

Ye Tian looked at this large but very dilapidated temple, and it was difficult to equate it with the so-called temple.

But no matter what, these two warriors were very extraordinary, even much more powerful than the Purple Soul Python that Ye Tian had seen.

"I wonder if they have any talent?"

Ye Tian turned on the copying talent and looked at the two warriors.

Swish!

Two talent pictures appeared in front of Ye Tian, allowing Ye Tian to see the talent of these two warriors.

Seeing this, Ye Tian was surprised.
